name_cn:
『Burberry』
🔥 Burberry check leather wallet, comes with a chain leather shoulder strap. Can be used as a small handbag on its own, or as a wallet inside a daily bag. Counter quality, fine workmanship, real photos, black check, Size 21cm*12cm*3cm, 8687
